prompt: Ultra-minimalist surreal football portrait of a professional player against a solid deep burgundy background, centered composition, wearing an authentic national team jersey, direct eye contact, neutral expression. A glossy liquid-metal ribbon slices horizontally through the face at eye level, stretching far beyond the head with smooth fluid motion, creating a warped distortion effect that reveals the eyes in full natural color while the rest of the portrait remains monochrome black and white. Hyper-realistic skin texture, dramatic studio lighting, high contrast, cinematic shadows, symmetrical framing, editorial fashion photography, abstract optical illusion, clean negative space, ultra-sharp focus, premium magazine cover aesthetic, photorealistic, 85mm lens, f/2, HDR, 8K, no text, no watermark.
promptEn: Ultra-minimalist surreal football portrait of a professional player against a solid deep burgundy background, centered composition, wearing an authentic national team jersey, direct eye contact, neutral expression. A glossy liquid-metal ribbon slices horizontally through the face at eye level, stretching far beyond the head with smooth fluid motion, creating a warped distortion effect that reveals the eyes in full natural color while the rest of the portrait remains monochrome black and white. Hyper-realistic skin texture, dramatic studio lighting, high contrast, cinematic shadows, symmetrical framing, editorial fashion photography, abstract optical illusion, clean negative space, ultra-sharp focus, premium magazine cover aesthetic, photorealistic, 85mm lens, f/2, HDR, 8K, no text, no watermark.
promptZh: 极简主义超现实足球肖像，专业球员置于纯色 深酒红色 背景中，居中构图，身穿 正版国家队球衣，直视镜头，表情中性。一条光泽的液态金属丝带在眼睛高度水平切过面部，以平滑的流体运动向头部两侧延伸，产生扭曲效果，显露出全彩色的双眼，而肖像其余部分保持黑白单色。超逼真的皮肤纹理，戏剧性的摄影棚灯光，高对比度，电影级阴影，对称构图，时尚杂志摄影风格，抽象视觉错觉，干净的留白，超清晰对焦，高级杂志封面美学，照片级真实感，85mm 镜头，f/2，HDR，8K，无文字，无水印。
